purpose: Defines the public-safe normalized timetable output records that sit between extracted meeting candidates and calendar view model summaries.

field_definitions.meeting_id: Stable public-safe identifier for one authority, racecourse, and local-date meeting.
field_definitions.country_id: Stable country identifier shared with country and timetable datasets.
field_definitions.authority_id: Stable racing authority identifier within the country scope.
field_definitions.racecourse_id: Stable racecourse identifier for the meeting location.
field_definitions.timezone: IANA timezone used to interpret local race times.
field_definitions.source_id: Stable official source identifier from source inventory or reviewed candidate provenance.
field_definitions.route_id: Stable acquisition route identifier used to produce or verify the record; use null only when no route contract exists yet.
field_definitions.source_status: Public source verification/freshness status applied to the normalized meeting fact.
field_definitions.capability_rank: Public-safe capability rank controlling which time summary fields can be exposed to monthly/day calendar display.
field_definitions.first_race_time_local: Local HH:MM first race time when supported by source status and capability rank; otherwise null.
field_definitions.last_race_time_local: Local HH:MM last race time when supported by source status and capability rank; otherwise null.
field_definitions.official_source_url: Official confirmation URL for the source or meeting.
field_definitions.last_checked_date: Date the normalized meeting fact was last checked, using YYYY-MM-DD, or null when not checked yet.
field_definitions.display_status: Calendar display readiness/status label for this normalized meeting summary.
field_definitions.notes: Public-safe notes for limitations, partial coverage, or source caveats; no private/internal notes or prohibited racing content.

display_rules.C: first_race_time_local and last_race_time_local must be null.
display_rules.B: first_race_time_local may be set, and last_race_time_local must be null.
display_rules.B+: first_race_time_local and last_race_time_local may be set.
display_rules.A: Monthly/day calendar summary must not expose race-by-race detail; only safe summary fields are allowed. first_race_time_local and last_race_time_local may be set.
